citations.quote: Rent Arrears: £5526.66 Student Name: ANFAL ELBUSHRA As at: 20th April 2026 ... NTQ Date: 18th May 2026 ... Payment Reqd: 9th May 2026
NOTICE TO QUIT ... 20 April 2026 ... ANFAL ELBUSHRA ... breached the Tenancy Agreement ... Clause 2 ... move from Bedroom B Flat 05 Castlelaw House
Where a Rent account is in arrears by two monthly instalments, the Landlord will be entitled to issue a notice to quit this Tenancy Agreement
Duty to make reasonable adjustments and failure to comply with that duty

proposed_artifacts.content:
# Citation Fix Report

## Replaced Citations
- C-002: Replaced with citation to NAP-SRC-0010, Clause 2(b), which authorizes notice to quit after two months' arrears.
- C-003: Replaced with citation to NAP-SRC-0010, Clause 2(b), for the same reason.
- C-006: Replaced with citation to authority auth-eb5f2cefd7674cf18e27c08f2af3960c (Equality Act 2010, sections 20 and 21) for reasonable adjustments duty.

## Validation
All new citations reference allowed targets: NAP-SRC-0010 (source) and auth-eb5f2cefd7674cf18e27c08f2af3960c (authority).

## Remaining Risks
Other citations in the draft were not fully audited; a follow-up task is proposed.
proposed_artifacts.title: Citation Fix Report for Draft Complaint

proposed_tasks.instructions: Audit all citations in the draft complaint (art-0e6fe6dbf06942e19dc6c1baa3b40b6d) against allowed targets and source materials. Flag any unsupported or fabricated citations and propose replacements.
proposed_tasks.title: Full citation audit of draft complaint

risk_flags.description: Fabricated citations undermine the credibility of the draft complaint and may lead to adverse legal consequences.
Reliance on unverified authorities could result in incorrect legal arguments.
The draft complaint may contain other unsupported claims not yet identified.

summary: Audit of draft complaint citations reveals unsupported and fabricated references. C-002 and C-003 cite a non-existent artifact; C-006 cites an authority not in the matter's authority map. Proposed fix replaces them with valid source citations and a verified authority. A follow-up task is proposed to verify the full draft against source materials.

uncertainties.description: The exact content of the missing artifact 'art-a788d9fd8e8849dba5da5cf7a1ef238f' is unknown; it may have been a synthesis or placeholder.
The authority 'auth-4f674054343440669658040cbf63c30b' is not in the matter's authority map; its validity is unverified.
The draft complaint may contain additional unsupported citations beyond those flagged.
